programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Jacqueline want a holiday home in Torremolinos that's perfect for their pooch and for exploring Spain on their motorbike. Scarlette Douglas shows them what their £150,000 can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nat and Ruth love the quaint villages and beautiful scenery of Tarn in France and want to buy their very own holiday home there. Laura Hamilton shows them five great options for £90,000.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lincolnshire. First to host is hunting enthusiast Hunni Hindley, who offers up an unconventional menu and a murder mystery-themed party. (Ep1/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lincolnshire. On the second night, Caroline Bevis treats her guests to a 'Roaring 20s' dinner party with a 'swellegant soufflé' starter and 'porkin on the Ritz' for the main. (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lincolnshire. Glenn Priestly hosts a rock legends dinner for his guests. But student Richard lowers the tone of the evening. (Ep3/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lincolnshire. Richard Summers-Calvert hopes to win over his guests with an audacious menu of chicken and rice for his starter, main and dessert! (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sandra and Gary can't wait to find their dream holiday home on Spain's Costa Cálida... even though they've never been there before! Ben Hillman shows them what their £90k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rooman and Richard dream of buying a holiday bolthole in sunny Fuengirola for quick getaways whenever they get the chance. Can Jean Johansson find them the one for their budget of £130k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carol and David are making their dream of buying a home in Valencia a reality. They've already sold up in the UK, so the pressure's on to find the one for £225k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Limboland

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In Dorset, former Mayfair chef Bradley's eggstensive culinary eggsperience has everyone eggspecting an eggsceptional breakfast at The Lord Bute. But then one guest sends back his eggs.

programme.desc: The week's last visit is to mum and son Prity and Kyle's aparthotel, The Pocklington, in Leicester, where parking problems soon put the brakes on their chances.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to Fritha and Justin's Northop Hall Country House Hotel in Flintshire, where things get frosty over al fresco drinks, and breakfast is chaotic.

programme.desc: Editor Susan Ryeland becomes embroiled in a web of intrigue and murder when she receives Alan Conway's unfinished manuscript of an Atticus Pünd mystery.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: While Yildiz and Ender prepare a new trap for Leyla, Sahika begins to manipulate her to bring her closer to Halit. At the same time, family tensions rise with Zerrin's return.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: While Yildiz receives an unexpected offer to work on television, Leyla gains more and more ground with Halit. At the same time, the dinner organized by Lila brings together two conflicting families.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Elena decides to go live with Roberta and Gabriella, but Antonio doesn't take it well.

programme.title: Julie and Julia
programme.desc: Julie Powell feels stuck. And go on the adventure! For 365 days, Julie cooks the 524 recipes from Julia Child's book - the woman who, in the late 40s, forever changed the way of cooking in America. And he also reports his experiences on a blog...

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Songül and Yildiz think they have already martyred Onur and Lale enough. When Onur and Lale are having another secret meeting at the flower shop, Songül appears and Onur runs away with Lale on her lap.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Ezgi discovers that she was betrayed and gives up on love. Özgür is pressured by his mother to get married and have children. The two share a taxi and argue. Ezgi receives news and is run over.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: As Brooke tries to redeem herself in the consul's eyes, a new realization leads Sandokan and Marianne to a Dayak village hidden in the Sarawak jungle.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Yildiz dreams of a glamorous life. Ender, rich and admired, offers her a job, but with an unexpected condition: seducing her own husband Halit.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit starts to feel attracted to Yildiz. Halit meets the plastic surgeon Sinan, a friend of his daughter, at a party, and soon jokes about the beauty of women and the money of their husbands appear.

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Kemal, from humble origins, meets Nihan, fortunate and forced to marry a man she doesn't like. Their lives will never be the same again.

programme.title: Brilliant Mind
programme.desc: Frank is a single man who raises his 7-year-old niece Mary - a gifted girl, who he wants to give a normal life. But when the girl's grandmother realizes her granddaughter's capabilities, she makes other plans for her that could separate Frank and Mary.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem dreams of living in the Galapagos Islands and being a writer, but her mother wants her to find a job. When she gets it at an advertising agency, the young woman kisses Can at the company's birthday party.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Can searches for the mysterious woman I kiss in the middle of the darkness while Emre discovers that Aziz plans to hand over the director's position to Can, so he goes to Aylin and proposes that they become allies.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Emré gives Sanem a check to pay her father's debts, but in return she will have to be his faithful assistant. Furthermore, the young woman has to retrieve a folder from Can's office.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem sneaks into Emre's house to get the folder and Can takes it. To get away with it, the young woman lies and confesses to him that she lost a ring.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Tension between Yigit and Lila explodes after a humiliating family dinner, while Yildiz persists in the idea of ​​becoming a presenter. On the other hand, Nadir and Ender prepare a new coup against Halit.

programme.title: So It's Complicated
programme.desc: Nancy, a 34-year-old woman, tired of the countless dates her friends arrange for her, stumbles upon a 40-year-old divorcee - Jack. He mistakes her for the 24-year-old “blind date” and soon Nancy decides to pretend and continue with that story...

programme.title: Family Friends
programme.desc: A childhood friend of a wedding planner decides to hire her to organize his wedding and the two become increasingly closer while the bride-to-be is focused on work.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: The President and Miss Wade
programme.desc: Andrew Shepherd (Michael Douglas), president of the United States and widower for just over a year, begins a romance with Sydney Wade (Annette Benning), a consultant for an important environmental organization. This relationship, in the middle of the election campaign, will be taken advantage of by Bob Rumson (Richard Dreyfuss), the opposing candidate, to attack the president.

programme.title: Moneyball, breaking the rules
programme.desc: The Oakland Athletics just lost again to the New York Yankees in the 2001 post-season. With their main stars, Johnny Damon, Jason Giambi and Jason Isringhausen leaving for another team, it will be the responsibility of their manager, Billy Beane, to find a solution. On a visit to Cleveland, Beane will meet Peter Brand, a young economics specialist from Yale who has a series of radical ideas about how to enhance the value of each player. As proof that he is right, Peter gives him the keys to why Billy failed when he played in the professional league. Convinced that what he says is true, the manager decides to hire him to completely turn his team around. But this new statistical method provokes terrible controversy. The players don't believe in him and neither do the team's shareholders. Instead of relying on each person's experience, character, or intuition, Billy ranks them based on their base percentage (OBP). Thus, he hires players with a very high OBP but with a series of characteristics that terribly undervalue them: one cannot run, another is too old... But the confrontation and controversy are too broad and now Beane will have to face a losing and demoralized team, an overexcited Peter, the team managers who do not believe in him and an entire country that believes that you cannot play that way. During pre-production on Moneyball, cinematographer Adam Kimmel was arrested for crimes related to sexual harassment and possession of illegal weapons and explosives. He was replaced by Wally Pfister. This is the first movie about baseball to be nominated for an Oscar since "Field of Dreams," twenty-two years earlier. In the film, Billy Beane refers to John Poloni as "Rocco." This is a reference to Jack McGee's father, who played in minor league baseball and whose nickname was "Rocco."

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: Year 2018. Judgment Day has passed and has devastated modern civilization. An army of Terminators roams the Earth to capture and kill all those humans who have survived. The few that remain have organized themselves and hide in bunkers creating what they call "The Resistance" to combat the robots when they have the chance even though they are outnumbered. The Terminators are controlled by Skynet, an artificial intelligence network that was created 14 years earlier by the government, but which turned against them, and which wants to cause nuclear annihilation. Only one man can stop it, John Connor. He has been taught his entire life for this moment by his mother, Sarah Connor, who already knew what was going to happen, but something that was not in her plans makes him doubt what he has known so far. The appearance of Marcus Wright, a stranger who comes from the past and whose last memory is of being on death row, and who also insists on having been with Kyle Reese, John's father. What John does not know is that Marcus, in 2003, had donated his organs and brain to the Cyberdyne company before being executed, and that with this they created a special Terminator who was left with his heart and biological brain. John must decide whether to trust Marcus as the Resistance prepares its final attack on the Terminators, which will take place at Skynet's base of operations.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Texas. Two years before the American Civil War broke out. King Schultz is a German bounty hunter who is tracking murderers to collect for their heads, and he promises the black slave Django to set him free on the condition that he helps him catch them. Django accepts, since his greatest wish is to go rescue his wife Broomhilda, a slave who is on the plantation of landowner Calvin Candie. This film, written and directed by Quentin Tarantino, is a western film with references to the spaghetti western genre; genre through which I wanted to portray a story about slavery like this one. Tarantino is a renowned American director, producer and screenwriter whose films are characterized by addressing non-linear stories, violence, Grindhouse influences, kung fu and spaghetti westerns. Starring Jamie Foxx ('Bait', 'Collateral'), Christoph Waltz ('Inglourious Basterds', 'Dorian'), Leonardo DiCaprio ('Titanic', 'The Great Gatsby') and Samuel L. Jackson ('S.W.A.T.', 'Star Wars'); The film is a mix of good dialogue, rhythm, irony, and an impeccable soundtrack that captures the viewer's attention at all times.

programme.title: damn bastards
programme.desc: With France occupied by the Nazis, a young Jewish woman witnesses the cruel murder of her parents by the expert Jew hunter Colonel Hans Landa. Barely escaping to save her life, she begins to plot revenge when years later a German war hero becomes interested in her and decides to premiere a film dedicated to her in his theater, which will be attended by great Nazi officers. This premiere catches the attention of "The Bastards", a group of Jewish-American soldiers led by Captain Aldo Raine. When the plans of this group of ruthless avengers and the young Jewish girl's conspiracy are put into motion, their paths will meet during an afternoon that will forever change the course of history. Although 30% of the film is originally spoken in English, the predominant languages ​​throughout the film are French and German, and a bit of Italian. In chapter three of the film "German Night in Paris" there is not a single sentence in English, something totally unusual in a Hollywood production.

programme.title: Essence of woman
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'Scent of a Woman', from 1974. Charlie is a young man who studies at a private school thanks to a scholarship. In order to get some money, he works on weekends. One day, he becomes the guide for a rude retired colonel who suffers from blindness and is ready to commit suicide. Little by little, the cold relationship between the two grows closer into a beautiful friendship that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: The Pelican Report
programme.desc: When Darby Shawn writes a report on who could have murdered the two judges of the Superior Court of Justice, he did not expect that from that moment on he would have to run for his life.

programme.title: Night of Vengeance
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Filmed entirely in the Philippines, "Platoon" tells us about the year a young university student named Chris spends in a regiment, who decides to volunteer for the Vietnam War. First part of a trilogy directed and written by Oliver Stone about the Vietnam War (followed by Born on the Fourth of July and Between Heaven and Earth). The protagonist of this story is a young Charlie Sheen, accompanied by a cast among which we highlight Willem Dafoe, Tom Berenger or some at that time still unknown Forest Whitaker or Johnny Depp. "Platoon" was the first film about Vietnam written and directed by a veteran of that war. Oliver Stone created this masterpiece taken from the experiences that he himself lived on the battlefield in his year as a soldier, filming almost a documentary where he tells us in first person through a character named Chris all his experiences in Vietnam. We are thus witnessing one of the most precise and realistic war films that recount this conflict with excellent direction, a script and impeccable editing. As for the exteriors, they are very well detailed and this perfection makes the viewer quickly immerse themselves in the war atmosphere that surrounds everything without rest. Definitely, a spectacular film that shows what until then Hollywood always tried to hide and the best way to get closer to what those days in Vietnam really were. Classic of the eighties and universal cinema.

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: big kids 2
programme.desc: After the pleasant experience he had three summers ago, Lenny (Adam Sandler) decides to move with his family to his hometown, where he hopes to raise his children just as he was raised. His best friends are waiting for him there, who also live there with their families. But the four friends, reunited again, cannot stay for long without getting into trouble. And what was expected to be a change for the better in the lives of their children ends up becoming an opportunity for parents to live new and exciting adventures. Together they will face the new bullies in town, reconnect with the old ones, and be victims of harassment from all the people who meant something to them in primary school. Second part of the comedy of the same name released in 2010, starring four of the best-known comic faces on the international scene and in North American cinema: Adam Sandler ('Dad Cool', 'Billy Madison'), Kevin James ('The King of Queens', 'Hitch'), Chris Rock ('From Incompetent to President') and David Spade ('Give Me a Break', 'Rules of Engagement'). This is the first sequel filmed by actor Adam Sandler, he also wrote the script for this film and the first part. He wrote both scripts with Fred Wolf, one of the writers of the comedy show 'Saturday Night Live'.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: A very dangerous alien has escaped from the high-security prison on the Moon with the help of his exuberant admirer. The alien is called "Boris the Animal", a ruthless being that Agent K. captured in 1969 and whom they must face again. Unaware of Boris's escape, K. (Tommy Lee Jones) and J. (Will Smith) continue carrying out their work as M.I.B. agents. ridding the city of dangerous aliens or aliens with petty crimes. At the beginning of a new day, J. can't find his partner anywhere, but that's not the most worrying thing, no one at the agency seems to know of his existence. In his investigation he will realize that Boris has made a jump in time and has killed K. completely changing history and causing the Earth to be unprotected against an imminent alien attack. J. will have to travel back in time to recover his partner and save the future of the planet. Specifically, he will travel to the year 1969, when K. is still a young agent with a certain sense of humor. Together they will try to catch the evil Boris. To do this, they will have the intermittent and relative help of a character who is capable of seeing all the space-time lines of the Universe at every moment. The film began filming without a definitive script, so production was delayed due to all the rewrites that were done until it was completed. For the role of Boris, the participation of actor Sacha Baron Cohen, known for his leading roles in the films "Borat" and "The Dictator", was reconsidered. But in the end the role was awarded to Jemaine Clement. The makeup he wore to embody the alien took four and a half hours to apply each day of filming. Will Smith had his ups and downs with the film's director, Barry Sonnenfeld, because he wanted the person to play the role of the colonel's son to be his son, Jaden Smith, and not Cayen Martin, who ultimately got the role.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

According to the Mayan calendar, the year 2012 is set as the date of the end of the world. This end of the world will bring different natural disasters, volcanoes will erupt, there will be major floods, typhoons... Jackson Curtis (John Cusack) is a writer of science fiction stories who also works as a driver for a Russian millionaire. Jackson is divorced and has two children, Lilly (Morgan Lily) and Noah (Liam James) who live with his ex-wife's boyfriend. One day, when Jackson and his children return home they find that great seismic activity is affecting the entire West Coast of the United States. Suddenly the Curtis family will find themselves immersed in a fight to survive what could be the end of the world. Actor John Cusack, known for his performance in films such as '1408' (2007), 'High Fidelity' (2000) and 'How to Be John Malkovich' (1999), stars in this feature film about the consequences of the end of the world that the Mayans predicted would happen in 2012. Its director, Roland Emmerich, specialized in action films and apocalyptic and disaster films, confirmed the film's completion. of a television series, a sequel to the feature film, which would be based on the survivors of the disaster. An alternative ending to the film was also included in some versions of the DVD marketed in different countries. For its promotion, a trailer was used in which you could see how a tsunami threatened the Himalayas, ending with the phrase 'The governments of the world did not prepare the people for the end of the world, find out the truth.' The page of the fictitious organization 'Institute for Human Continuity' was also launched, thus beginning an important viral marketing strategy.

programme.title: Cross-fire
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of a store owner and his son, firefighter Jeremy Coleman miraculously escapes with his life. Having witnessed the murders and being forced to testify against the gang of gangsters that carried them out, specifically against their leader, David Hagan, he is integrated into the witness protection program under the supervision of the Marshalls. Agent Talia will be in charge of protecting Jeremy's life from this cruel murderer. Inspector Mike Calla will be in charge of handling Coleman's case, a man who precisely lost his wife at the hands of the same gangster who committed this crime, and who since then has not stopped searching for him to do justice. The problem comes when Jeremy Coleman's new identity is compromised, so the firefighter is forced to take action to recover his life and save those of his loved ones.

programme.title: This house is a ruin
programme.desc: Anna (Shelley Long) is a young and attractive violinist who stays for a few days with her boyfriend, the lawyer Walter Fielding (Tom Hanks), in the luxurious apartment of her ex-husband, the great conductor Max Beissart (Alexander Godunov). They are happy, but they want to be even more so. Walter's formula is very simple, happiness is in a little house on the outskirts of New York with its white fence, a dog, two children and a little woman. But, at least for the moment, Anna's intentions do not involve marriage. However, the urgent need to look for a house is imposed when her ex-husband returns suddenly and needs to reoccupy her apartment. Walter turns to his friend Jack (Josh Mostel), a real estate agent, who provides him with a real bargain a few kilometers from New York, a dream house for very little money. After managing to raise the money, the couple buys the house from Estelle, its quirky owner (Maureen Stapleton). But unfortunately, mishaps begin to happen in this fabulous mansion: doorbells burn, the bed sinks, the door falls, steps break, ceilings fall apart, pipes shake and, as the final number, the staircase shatters. But since they still really like the house, with the best of their will they set out to fix the mess. They turn to the service of the unique Shirk brothers, Art (Joe Mantegna), the carpenter, and Brad (Carmine Caridi), the plumber.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro
programme.desc: 1821. The Mexican army strives to liberate its country from the Spanish yoke. In the Californias area, the evil Spanish governor, Don Rafael Montero, is about to lose everything. In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. With the help of two orphans, Joaquín and Alejandro Murrieta, Zorro frees the prisoners. Then he will give both boys a special medallion and flee on his horse, Tornado, after marking Montero with a small "Z" on his neck as a warning. But that same night the soldiers enter the house of a nobleman named Don Diego de la Vega and arrest him since they are convinced that he is the real Zorro. Don Diego's wife dies, he is locked up in prison and his daughter, Elena, is taken to Spain as Montoro's daughter, where he will raise her as if she were his own. Twenty years later, Montoro secretly returns to California and looks for Diego in prison but cannot find him because he is unrecognizable due to age. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

programme.title: The legend of Zorro
programme.desc: 1850. California has been tortured by the colonizers for years but will finally become the thirty-first state of the Union. Zorro suspects that a group of individuals intend to sabotage this decision for their own benefit, so he will stop them in a heroic feat. At the same time, McGivens, a French baron, is dedicated to blackmailing the inhabitants of California to keep their lands and leaving those who earned their living from the countryside in absolute poverty. Don Alejandro de la Vega, the one nicknamed "Zorro" with his mask, his sword, his horse and his cape, has finally been able to marry the beautiful Elena and has a ten-year-old son named Joaquín. The little boy misses his father, whom he hardly sees, and on the other hand idealizes the figure of his hero, Zorro, without knowing what his true identity is. Alejandro promises to leave the mask behind forever and dedicate himself to his family, but when a new crisis appears in California, he acts once again to solve it. Elena, feeling cheated, kicks her husband out of the house and presents him with divorce papers. At that moment, an old companion of the woman arrives at the scene: the French aristocrat Army. When he finds out about Elena's separation, he immediately begins to court her while attending to his affairs in the secret brotherhood in which he is involved. Now Alejandro will have to choose between alleviating the suffering of the oppressed or returning to his family. But to do so he must defeat the always shady Baron Army. For "The Legend of Zorro" both Steven Spielberg and Robert Rodriguez planned to direct the film, but in the end they did not take the job, although Spielberg did stay on as executive producer.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is a top secret government agent with a license to kill who decides to quit his job when he finds and marries the woman of his dreams. But happiness is short-lived, since they have put a price on his head. He doesn't know who is after him, but he knows that there are several murderers and that it could be anyone. His neighbors, his friends, former colleagues, his current co-workers... Spencer will team up with his wife to find out who the mysterious characters are who want him dead before the bullies finish them off... and their marriage!

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: Agent 47 has been genetically engineered to become an effective and lethal hitman, working under instructions from a mysterious group known as 'The Organization'. However, when he finds himself involved in a political conspiracy that is beyond his understanding, he will turn against what he has known until now to try to find out who has set him up. While Interpol and the Russian army search for him throughout Europe, the murderer will have to face two new elements in his life: conscience and love.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: Zooloco
programme.desc: The animals at Franklin Park Zoo adore their kind keeper, Griffin Keyes. When Griffin realizes that he is more comfortable with a lion than a lady, he decides that the only way to get a girl to share his life is to leave the zoo and look for a more glamorous job.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2: El poder de Electro
programme.desc: Peter Parker leads a very busy life: he has to save the city from bad guys and also continue with his university life to take care of Gwen, although from a distance. Things get complicated when the villain Electro appears with a thirst for revenge. However, it won't be the only thing Peter has to face, as the return of an old friend, Harry Osborn, brings new clues about his past.

programme.title: A town called Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Harry Dalton (Pierce Brosnan) is one of the most renowned volcanologists at the United States Geological Survey. Four years after his partner's death during a volcanic eruption in Colombia, Harry receives a call from his boss, Paul Dyfrus (Charles Hallahan), to discuss the unusual behavior of a hitherto dormant volcano. Meanwhile, the city of Dante's Peak, located on one of the volcano's plains, is celebrating being named the second most desired place to live in the country. Harry begins his investigation in the area and discovers clear signs that the volcano could soon erupt. The scientist wants to put the city on alert, but the inhabitants have economic interests that could be harmed if they heed Harry's warnings. Everyone ignores it until it's too late. The director, Roger Donaldson, was drawn to the project because he was once a geology student. Many of the film's special effects were done practically. The ash from the volcano was actually very fine shavings of newspaper. According to an interview with Donaldson, the camera that Harry Dalton uses during his investigation is actually owned by Pierce Brosnan. Initially the main role was going to be played by Michael Douglas. Most of the film's exteriors were shot in Wallas, Idaho. It was also filmed on Dante's Peak, adding certain details with digital technology.

programme.title: Mutiny on board
programme.desc: In 1787, the ship Bounty made a dangerous journey of 50,000 kilometers. After a month of sailing under strong storms, Captain William Bligh allows the crew to dock on a remote island so that they can rest. After seeing the situation of lack of control among the sailors, the captain insists on returning to the boat to continue his trip. However, the second in command, Fletcher Christian, will support his men.

programme.title: When the river rises
programme.desc: The story takes place in Tennessee. Despite the threat of a rising river and a poor harvest, Tom Garvey and his wife Mae, a young farming couple, are determined to preserve the land of their ancestors. But, burdened by debt, Tom is forced to become a scab during a strike at the local steel mill, leaving his wife to run the farm. Upon their return, they have to face not only the flooding of a furious river that can wash away the work of so many years but also a power-hungry landowner who covets the lands of the Garveys and their neighbors to satisfy his ambition.

programme.title: China's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: Music and dance in China enjoy a fascinatingly long lineage dating back to at least 3000 BC. Ancient documents reveal countless forms of music and dance in connection with religious rituals, folk festivals and everyday life. Alastair explores some of the most iconic forms of ancient Chinese music and dance and also discovers how they are celebrated and kept alive today.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: Talking Movies
programme.desc: To mark America's 250th anniversary, Talking Movies hears from leading figures in US media, film and culture who tell the BBC about some iconic American movies and what these films reveal about the country and the psyche of her people. American Psycho director Mary Harron talks about Martin Scorsese's The King of Comedy, while critic and film-maker Bilge Ebiri looks at Hitchcock's classic thriller North by Northwest. BBC News presenter Sumi Somaskanda reveals her passion for the prison drama The Shawshank Redemption and award-winning journalist Tim Teeman selects Steven Spielberg's Jaws. Talking Movies' host Tom Brook chooses the Robert Altman ensemble satire Nashville. Each contributor speaks about what their film choice means to them and how and why they feel it has become an American cinema classic. This special illustrates the American nation on the big screen and the influence it's had in bringing its movies to the world.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: On the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, Dwayne Fields travels across the USA, exploring how the document's famous promise - the pursuit of happiness - is being lived today. In the second part of his adventure, Dwayne travels from the centre of the country's happiness industry in Las Vegas to its biggest Chinatown in San Francisco to explore what happiness means to Americans today.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: The race between America and China to lead the world in artificial intelligence is reshaping the global balance of power. But behind the headlines, a hidden conflict is unfolding. Join AI Decoded as we examine the seizure of $13 million worth of advanced AI chips allegedly bound for China, and Anthropic's claim that Alibaba carried out the largest known AI 'distillation attack' in history. As nations and tech giants compete for supremacy, the battle for AI is increasingly being fought in the shadows. Who will win the race for AI dominance, and how far will they go to get there?

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Cook and food writer Rachel Khoo visits the cool of Sweden's capital city to continue her culinary journey. Rachel visits one of Stockholm's hippest restaurants, where rump of deer is on the menu. Back home, she's inspired by Sweden's traditional cinnamon buns and bakes her own savoury Swedish buns as well as cooking venison steak with celeriac puree, pickled blackberries and carrot petals and a lingonberry and raspberry marzipan tart, inspired by the Swedish lingonberry.

programme.title: BBC Wales Investigates
programme.desc: You could be a scroll away from finding a sperm donor. But at what cost? With fertility prices soaring and treatment difficult to access for some, same-sex female couples say they have little choice but to turn to social media to make a baby. Social media groups and apps are fuelling a cheap, easy and totally unregulated donor market. But it’s risky: outside of a sperm clinic, there’s no guarantee of health screening, and you’re not legally protected. And it’s not just a gamble for those wanting to get pregnant. According to the UK’s fertility regulator, men who donate sperm outside of clinics may also be breaking the law if they’re storing, processing or sending sperm. But what do they think of this? Meet the men travelling the world to donate sperm, and find out what happens when reporter Gemma Dunstan tries to order a sample online.

programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Cintaku Seluas TPU
programme.desc: Vita marah pada Ferly yang ketahuan selingkuh dengan Yoana. Vita mengebut dengan mobilnya dan hampir menabrak Abi. Di hari yang sama dia mendapat kabar kakeknya meninggal dan Vita di beri warisan lahan TPU.

programme.title: Putri Langit Cari Jodoh
programme.desc: Anjani putri khayangan yang diturunkan ke bumi selama 100 hari untuk mencari pemuda sebagai calon suami. Sebelum turun ke bumi, Anjani dibekali kalung yang menjadi sumber kekuatannya. Siapa yang menjadi pilihan sang puteri?

programme.title: Pembalap Insyaf
programme.desc: Vivi harus menghidupi keluarganya dengan bekerja sebagai pembalap liar untuk Angga. Sementara Bayu adalah seorang polisi. Ketika balapan liar digerebek secara tiba-tiba. Vivi melarikan diri dan pingsan di sebuah musala.

programme.title: Prajurit Bantegan
programme.desc: Igo pindah dari kota besar setelah kedua orang tuanya meninggal. Saat mendapat masalah dengan pemilik sanggar bantengan, dia bertemu Ki Sungkur yang menolongnya. Sejak itu dia berguru silat kepada Ki Sungkur.

programme.title: Putri Keong Mas
programme.desc: Puteri diserahkan kepada seorang dukun oleh ibu tirinya yang sangat kejam. Sejak saat itu, puteri hidup sebagai keong emas, dan hanya bisa kembali sebagai manusia jika ada seorang pemuda yang jatuh cinta kepadanya.

programme.title: Petaka Pencuri Uang Takziah
programme.desc: Lilis berasal dari keluarga kurang mampu. Dia mencuri uang takziah milik tetangganya Manda dan Somad yang baru saja meninggal. Semenjak saat itu hantu Manda dan Somad selalu meneror dirinya, sehingga akhirnya Lilis bertobat.

programme.title: Ketemu Cinta Di Online Shop
programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Telur Asin Cap Cinta
programme.desc: Tanpa sengaja Dhira merusak ponsel Cindy, dia pun bingung karena dia juga punya utang kepada orang lain. Akhirnya dia memutuskan berjualan telur asin.

programme.title: Petaka Topi Pemikat
programme.desc: Annisa kehilangan nenek yang merawatnya sejak kecil, ia difitnah para tetangga yang menuduhnya menjual rujak beracun. Kehidupan Annisa berubah saat mendapat topi pancar pesona dari toko KR. Amat. Setelah itu keanehan pun terjadi.

programme.title: Mantan Yang Tak Diundang
programme.desc: Ketika sedang berjalan dengan pacarnya, Kiena bertemu David, mantan pacarnya dulu. Yosha, pacar Kiena merasa kesal dengan David yang suka mengajak Kiena jalan. Apakah Kiena tetap setia dengan Yosha? Atau kembali dengan mantannya?

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat : Teko 1001 Malam
programme.desc: Rani, cewek cupu yang dirundung teman-temannya dan kerap mendapat perlakuan buruk. Ia juga mendapat perlakuan kasar dari tantenya. Rani menemukan teko usang, ketika digosok keluar sosok jin yang bisa mengabulkan tiga permintaan.

programme.title: Pangeran Klemar Klemer
programme.desc: Bima Sakti seorang pemuda manja seperti wanita. Ibu Bima merasa khawatir dan menjanjikan hadiah uang kepada tiga gadis anggota ekskul beladiri judo yang bisa membuat Bima mengikuti latihan. Keadaan menjadi rumit

programme.title: Mysterious Girlfriend
programme.desc: Olive adalah cewek kutu buku yang tidak mempunyai teman. Anehnya, dia punya pengagum rahasia bernama Gary yang selalu mengiriminya surat. Namun, tidak ada yang bisa melihat Gary!

programme.title: Rahasia Si Motor Bekas
programme.desc: Fira uring-uringan motor bututnya dijual papanya. Motor itu begitu berharga buat Fira pasalnya di dalam box motor itu terdapat buku resep yang sangat penting. Siapakah yang membeli? Apakah Fira mendapatkan kembali buku resepnya?

programme.title: Cintaku Tak Seindah FTV
programme.desc: Ada tetangga baru yang bikin Alya kepincut dengan ketampanannya. Ramzi, cowok ganteng dan keren itu bikin Alya penasaran. Alya seorang penulis FTV, kerap menulis cerita percintaan. Apakah kisah nyatanya bakal seindah cerita FTV?

programme.title: Tempe Mendoan Bumbu Cinta
programme.desc: Marvin adalah cowok tampan kaya raya yang sayang neneknya, dan sang nenek ingin sekali makan tempe mendoan. Marvin pun tak tahu pencariannya akan hidangan itu akan membawanya ke kisah asmara.

programme.title: Tempe Mendoan Bumbu Cinta
programme.desc: Marvin adalah cowok tampan kaya raya yang sayang neneknya, dan sang nenek ingin sekali makan tempe mendoan. Marvin pun tak tahu pencariannya akan hidangan itu akan membawanya ke kisah asmara.

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
Marco Polo
programme.desc: Saat bertemu dengan Marco Polo sang penjelajah Italia, kaisar Mongolia Kubilai Khan dibunuh. Marco Polo pun diminta untuk memimpin pasukan guna membasmi pemberontak anti-Mongol.

programme.title: The House Of 72 Tenants
programme.desc: 72 penghuni rumah petak nan kumuh hidup di bawah pengawasan pemilik rumah yang tak berperasaan dan suami jahatnya. Namun, kedatangan seorang penyewa baru nan berani, mengubah nasib mereka.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: Keluarga seorang pemimpin Anti-Ching yang dibunuh kabur ke kota kecil yang dihuni oleh para pelajar yang saling bersaing dan sejumlah pelatih olahraga yang tangguh. Namun, salah satu guru ternyata adalah agen rahasia.

programme.title: Moonlight Serenade
programme.desc: Dalam drama yang mengerikan ini, aktris populer Shaw Brothers, Li Jing, berperan sebagai putri pemilik penginapan di daerah pegunungan. Ia menyaksikan aksi pemerkosaan yang dilakukan oleh salah seorang penduduk.

programme.title: The Five Venoms
programme.desc: Sebuah film kung fu yang tak tertandingi dari sutradara film kung fu terbaik, Chang Cheh. Guru dari Klan Racun yang tengah sekarat mengirim murid terakhirnya dalam misi berbahaya untuk memburu lima prajurit.

programme.title: River Of Tears
programme.desc: Fang adalah seorang mantan penyanyi yang hidup bahagia bersama suami dan putranya. Namun, tragedi terjadi saat seorang pria dari masa lalunya kembali menghantuinya.

programme.title: Lady Of Steel
programme.desc: Ratu Kung-Fu asal Hong Kong, Cheng Pei-pei, berperan sebagai pendekar pedang wanita yang melakukan misi untuk membalas dendam atas kematian orangtuanya dan menyelamatkan negara dari penjajah asing.

programme.title: The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Komedi yang menggelikan ini menampilkan seorang pria lugu bernama Ah Niu. Dia pergi ke Hong Kong dan terus-menerus dieksploitasi dan dimanfaatkan, bahkan ditangkap dan dipenjara.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: Guo Jing bertemu Huang Rong dan mereka jatuh cinta. Di saat yang sama, Ouyang Ke melamar Huang Rong, sehingga ayah Huang mengatur sebuah duel untuk kedua pria tersebut.

programme.title: Hex Vs Witchcraft
programme.desc: Yu Nan adalah seorang penjudi kambuhan. Ia menjadikan istrinya sebagai uang muka atas utangnya. Ia pun menyesal dan memutuskan untuk bunuh diri, namun niatnya dihentikan oleh kemunculan sesosok hantu cantik.

programme.title: The Scandalous Warlord
programme.desc: Jenderal Feng menguasai kota Shandong. Tentara dan warga sipil di sana menyambutnya tanpa mengetahui sifat kejam dan nafsunya yang menyeramkan.

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Seorang peneliti muda berubah menjadi Inframan bertangan petir demi melawan Ibu Putri Naga yang bangun dari hibernasi untuk menaklukkan bumi bersama dengan pasukan monster mutannya.

programme.title: The Swift Knight
programme.desc: Sang Pendekar Tangkas terlibat dalam jalinan percintaan, intrik kekuasaan, dan pertarungan sembari melindungi bayi pewaris takhta dalam kisah tentang para pendekar pemberani, keksatriaan, dan wanita-wanita cantik ini.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: Dua pemuda bergabung dengan kelompok pemberontak setelah Revolusi Tiongkok tahun 1911 dan tak sengaja menjadi pahlawan. Dibantu oleh seorang putri panglima perang, mereka berhasil membantu pemberontak mencuri senjata.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: Dua pemuda bergabung dengan kelompok pemberontak setelah Revolusi Tiongkok tahun 1911 dan tak sengaja menjadi pahlawan. Dibantu oleh seorang putri panglima perang, mereka berhasil membantu pemberontak mencuri senjata.

programme.title: A Taste Of Cold Steel
programme.desc: Pertempuran mematikan yang tak terelakkan demi mendapatkan Pedang Ungu yang tak ternilai. Asisten sutradara Wang Po-yi berperan dalam penulisan naskah film petualangan yang menghibur ini.

programme.title: The Beautiful
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai dan Fanny Fan bergabung dengan grup menari asuhan Kao Pao-shu. Linda dan putra Kao sang manajer grup, Peter Chen, mengalami salah paham dan akhirnya saling membenci.

programme.title: The 36th Chamber Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Dalam film peraih penghargaan di tahun 1978 ini, Liu Yu-Te kabur ke Kuil Shaolin dan menguasai 35 jurus Kung Fu Shaolin. Setelah berhasil membalaskan dendamnya, ia berlatih Jurus ke-36.

programme.title: Forever Diamonds
programme.desc: Penipu cantik bernama Hua mencuri sebuah cincin berlian dari toko di Hong Kong dan kabur ke Singapura. Untuk menghindari bea cukai, ia memasukkan cincin itu ke dalam saku pria asing, tapi ia kehilangan jejaknya.

programme.title: The Bloody Escape
programme.desc: Ku adalah ahli Kung Fu terampil yang dibesarkan oleh para bandit dan tidak suka dengan pemimpin brutal dari kamp bandit tersebut. Ia menyelamatkan Tong, seorang wanita muda yang dipaksa menjadi istri sang pemimpin.

programme.title: The Empress Dowager
programme.desc: Selama 5.000 tahun sejarah Tiongkok, tidak ada wanita yang bisa menandingi wanita naga dari Dinasti Ching, sang Ibu Suri yang menjadi motor penggerak takhta di paruh akhir abad ke-19.

programme.title: The Boxer From The Temple
programme.desc: Di kota, ia berhadapan dengan putra seorang bandit kejam dan seorang PSK yang disiksa. Sejak itu, pertarungan demi pertarungan terjadi saat kekuatan 'Crazy Lo Han Fist' yang dikuasainya menghancurkan geng-geng jahat.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black
programme.desc: Berlatar pada masa kependudukan Jepang saat PD II, Tang Qi yang merupakan yatim piatu jatuh cinta dengan pemuda bernama Chang. Namun, cinta mereka dipenuhi tantangan, seperti tekanan keluarga hingga gejolak perang.

programme.title: Rape Of The Sword
programme.desc: Li Li-hua berperan sebagai seorang wanita pendekar pedang yang berusaha untuk merebut kembali 'Pedang Hijau', pedang paling tajam di dunia, milik suaminya yang tewas dibunuh.

programme.title: Illicit Desire
programme.desc: Seorang sineas, Li han-hsiang, mengubah kisah-kisah erotis dan mistis dari kesusasteraan Tiongkok klasik dan mengubahnya menjadi sebuah film yang luar biasa.

programme.title: King Eagle
programme.desc: Film kung fu klasik ini disutradarai oleh Chang Cheh dan dibintangi oleh pendekar pedang Ti Lung, berkisah tentang Raja Elang yang harus melawan kelompok Tong setelah ia jatuh cinta pada sang ketua yang cantik, Li Ching.

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Beberapa tahun sebelum film Ghostbusters sukses di Hollywood, Wong Jing menulis film komedi supranatural yang dibintangi oleh Alexander Fu dan disutradarai oleh Lau Ka Wing ini.

programme.title: The Three Smiles
programme.desc: Seorang pelajar berbakat, Bo Hu, tertarik dengan seorang pelayan nan cantik, Qiu Xiang. Agar dapat mendekatinya dan memenangkan cintanya, ia menyamar sebagai seorang pelayan untuk bekerja di rumah yang sama.

programme.title: The Tea House
programme.desc: Dalam drama kejahatan yang disutradarai oleh Kuei Chih Hung ini, legenda seni bela diri Chan Koon Tai berperan sebagai seorang pemimpin geng yang menjalankan aksinya di sebuah kafe lokal.

programme.title: The Tea House
programme.desc: Dalam drama kejahatan yang disutradarai oleh Kuei Chih Hung ini, legenda seni bela diri Chan Koon Tai berperan sebagai seorang pemimpin geng yang menjalankan aksinya di sebuah kafe lokal.

programme.title: Love Parade
programme.desc: Perancang busana Shi tidak terima dengan kritik Mui kala memintanya untuk mengomentari desain barunya. Saat Mui memintanya untuk merancang gaun untuk menghadiri pesta, Shi membalas dendam dengan membuat kostum badut.

programme.title: The Secret Of The Dirk
programme.desc: Penduduk Kota Liu terpaksa melarikan diri saat geng Macan Hitam yang kejam menyerang kota. Namun, para penduduk berhasil menyembunyikan semua emas dan harta mereka di sebuah lembah.

programme.title: The Lotus Lamp
programme.desc: Dalam film fantasi nan menawan ini, Lin Dai berperan sebagai seorang dewi yang jatuh cinta pada seorang pria terpelajar. 14 tahun kemudian, putra mereka berusaha menguak misteri tentang jati dirinya.

programme.title: The Convict Killer
programme.desc: Dalam film yang merangkai misteri dan ketegangan dengan aksi kung fu ini, seorang ahli kung fu membalas dendam setelah mendekam selama 15 tahun di penjara. Ia mampu bertahan menghadapi ujian di sepanjang hidupnya!

programme.title: The Venus' Tear Diamond
programme.desc: Pencuri permata Fragrant Night dan Nocturnal Earl, yang merupakan saingan, melakukan perjalanan ke Jepang untuk mencuri berlian air mata venus nan terkenal.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Ling Hsiao dan Kuan Wang-lung bekerja sebagai penjaga di Tien Ying Treasury House, sebuah perusahaan yang menawarkan jasa penyimpanan dan transportasi yang aman bagi uang atau barang berharga milik para klien.

programme.title: The Big Sting
programme.desc: Tiga sekawan menemukan sebuah artefak langka, tapi mereka diracun oleh Nyonya Wu yang ingin mencurinya. Sebelum tewas, ketiganya meminta istri mereka berjanji guna melatih anak mereka untuk mengambilnya kembali.

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Saat kematian ayahnya, David Chiang mengetahui bahwa ia memiliki saudara tiri di Thailand. Dan Chiang mendapati saudara tirinya berprofesi sebagai petinju demi mendapatkan uang untuk ibunya yang sakit.

programme.title: Torrent Of Desire
programme.desc: David jatuh cinta pada Dan Feng dan menikahinya. Saudari David yang bernama Mona jatuh cinta dengan sahabatnya, Han Ming. Karena cemburu, Mona berbohong tentang perselingkuhan antara Han Ming dan Dan Feng.

programme.title: The Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: Wang Yu berperan sebagai murid seni bela diri yang hebat. Guru dan teman-temannya dibunuh oleh Lo Lieh, seorang ahli karate kejam. Ia pun memulai serangkaian latihan berat untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Tersebar kabar jika Ku yang buta menyimpan rahasia Telapak Tangan Buddha. Ia pun diserbu dari berbagai pihak seperti burung-burung raksasa nan mengerikan dan kelompok-kelompok pendekar bela diri.

programme.title: The Tiger And The Widow
programme.desc: Hui Ying-hung terlibat dalam sebuah jaringan penyelundupan orang-orang hilang dan berada dalam situasi yang membahayakan.

programme.title: Tales Of A Eunuch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang perjuangan seorang berandal terkenal, yang gemar berjudi dan terlibat masalah dengan para penjahat dan pemberontak, dalam mencari sebuah naskah khusus Buddha.

programme.title: The Silent Swordsman
programme.desc: Seorang pendekar pedang muda ditugaskan memimpin perkumpulan rahasia patriotik demi melawan jenderal pengkhianat yang berkolusi dengan musuh. Lalu, ia bertemu dengan seorang prajurit wanita dan dua putri cantik.

programme.title: The Mask Of Shura Of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: Klan Black Feather nan jahat menyusup ke wilayah Master Fire Cloud dan mencuri Topeng Shura, sehingga melepaskan roh jahat nan masih bayi. Namun, Master Fire Cloud mengadopsi bayi itu untuk mencegahnya menjadi jahat.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: Raja Naga dikunci dalam segel oleh Tuan Naga selama 500 tahun, dan putri sang Raja harus kembali ke masa lalu guna membunuh Tuan Naga saat mengetahui bahwa keduanya adalah teman dekat di masa lalu.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: Seorang agen kekaisaran diejek karena berbagai penemuannya, hingga istrinya yang suportif mendorongnya untuk menghadiri sebuah konferensi, yang sebenarnya adalah jebakan untuk membunuh semua dokter yang melayani kaisar, di mana penemuan-penemuan gilanya menjadi berguna.

programme.title: Look For A Star
programme.desc: Terinspirasi oleh hubungan antara Stanly Ho dan istri keempatnya, Angela, film ini adalah komedi romantis tentang seorang miliarder yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang dealer kasino yang bersemangat.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: Seorang penulis yang putus asa menjalin persahabatan yang tidak terduga dengan seorang remaja dari Long Island.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Gangster kejam Guts melakukan perampokan berlian, lalu meminta bantuan anggota triad lama, Fei, untuk mengatur pembeli. Namun ketika Guts mengkhianati pembeli, Fei malah mendapatkan berlian tersebut, dan dicari oleh polisi serta Guts.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Seluruh sekolah disandera saat kompetisi pidato bahasa Inggris berlangsung. Ip Man pun memutuskan untuk bangkit dan menghadapi krisis, serta menemukan bahwa dalangnya adalah sang guru dan teman masa kecilnya.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 3
programme.desc: Petugas polisi Chow Sing Sing ditugaskan untuk bekerja secara menyamar menyelidiki pembunuhan jutawan Million Wong, yang memiliki kemiripan luar biasa dengan Chow, dengan berpura-pura menjadi Wong yang menderita amnesia.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Petinju dunia kriminal, Lin Feng, diburu oleh triad asal Bangkok kala ia menolak bertarung dalam sebuah pertandingan ilegal. Lin Feng berhasil melarikan diri, tetapi ia kehilangan ingatannya.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Skyline Cruisers
programme.desc: Petualangan aksi di mana formula obat penyembuh kanker dicuri, dan tim petarung kung-fu harus mengatasi saingan dan pengkhianatan untuk mendapatkannya kembali.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Raja Kera bereinkarnasi dalam wujud bukan manusia sebagai Joker, seorang perampok jalanan yang tidak menyadari identitas aslinya dan fakta bahwa 500 tahun sebelumnya, dia dan tuannya, Biksu Panjang Umur, dihukum dan dipaksa untuk tetap menjadi manusia.

programme.title: The Accidental Spy
programme.desc: Di sebuah pusat perbelanjaan di Hong Kong, intuisi Buck Yuen (Jackie Chan) memperingatkannya. Ia menyelamatkan hasil rampasan perampokan dan muncul di televisi, akhirnya sampai di Istanbul melalui Korea Selatan, dan tanpa sengaja menjadi mata-mata. Untungnya, ia menguasai Kung Fu.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong Fei-Hung adalah seorang pemuda yang nakal namun saleh, tetapi setelah serangkaian insiden, ayahnya yang frustrasi menyuruh seorang guru bela diri mabuk untuk mendisiplinkannya.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Seorang aktor berusaha meyakinkan sesosok wanita untuk berperan sebagai Samantha dalam film Bewitched yang dibuat ulang. Namun, ia tidak menyadari bila wanita itu ternyata benar-benar seorang penyihir!

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. B, yang memiliki nama lengkap Benjamin Barker, adalah seorang pegawai kantoran yang menjalani kehidupan monoton. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah insiden aneh di laboratorium ilmiah tempat temannya bekerja, Mr. B terpapar dengan zat misterius yang memberinya kemampuan untuk terbang. Awalnya, dia merasa bingung dan takut, tetapi segera dia mulai mengeksplorasi kekuatan barunya dengan penuh semangat.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: Flying Swords Of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: Berlatar tiga tahun setelah Dragon Inn, pemilik penginapan Jade telah menghilang dan sebuah penginapan baru telah bangkit dari reruntuhan - penginapan yang dikelola oleh para perampok yang menyamar sebagai warga negara yang taat hukum, yang berharap untuk menggali kota hilang yang legendaris yang terkubur di gurun.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Seorang playboy kaya tewas akibat diledakkan oleh seorang gangster ketika ia menggoda istri gangster tersebut. Melalui serangkaian kejadian, profesornya membuatkan tubuh sintetis yang memungkinkannya untuk berubah menjadi apa pun yang diinginkannya.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Tn. Zhang diusir dari klannya setelah tahanan Chi melarikan diri di bawah pengawasannya. Lalu, Tn. Zhang datang ke sebuah lokasi tempat hilangnya sejumlah orang dan menemukan bahwa Chi lah yang menangkap mereka.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist: Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Tahun 1917, Chen Zhen, yang diyakini telah meninggal, kembali ke Shanghai dengan nama palsu. Dia bergabung dengan seorang bos mafia untuk mendapatkan informasi tentang Jepang, termasuk daftar panjang orang yang ingin dibunuh, dan pada malam hari melawan orang-orang Jepang bertopeng.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 2
programme.desc: Perampok kuburan menemukan vampir yang diawetkan. Saat mengangkut vampir anak, mantra yang mengikatnya hilang, dan ia berteman dengan penduduk setempat. Vampir orang tua terbangun dan melarikan diri. Tabib herbal mengejar untuk menghancurkan mereka.

programme.title: Confession Of Pain
programme.desc: Seorang detektif membantu temannya menyelidiki kematian misterius ayah mertuanya.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang seorang pria yang mendapat sepucuk surat gaib tentang prediksi kematiannya, pria lainnya tengah berduka atas kematian sang istri tercinta, serta tiga kakak beradik yang berselisih saat makan malam.

programme.title: Wusong Vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song mengetahui perselingkuhan adik iparnya dengan pria kaya bernama Ximen Qing. Song pun dijebak dan diasingkan selama setahun oleh Qing, sementara sang adik dibunuh. Bisakah ia membalas kematian saudaranya?

programme.title: The Christmas Letter
programme.desc: Setiap tahun, copywriter pengangguran Joe Michaels membaca surat Natal tahunan temannya yang kaya raya, dan merasa seperti pecundang. Tapi tahun ini akan berbeda.

programme.title: Code Of A Killer, Pt 1

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: While in Paris, France, Ben catches Zombozo robbing the Louvre, but when Zombozo hypnotizes Ben to remain speechless, Ben must navigate a foreign land like a mime in order to stop the criminal clown and his travelling circus.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: A trip to the South Pole goes upside down when Team Tennyson lands on the North Pole instead, but Ben quickly discovers the culprits: Solar & Polar Twain, magnetically-powered scientists who want to hold the world ransom by threatening to reverse Earth's magnetic poles!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max arrive at a Native American national park to witness the Ayasha Plinths - an ancient Stonehenge-like rock formation - but when the sinister sorcerer Hex arrives, Ben must battle against a beast Hex magically made out of huge rocks!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson checks out a Samurai Museum in Tokyo, where Ben is too impatient to wait out the Calligraphy experience for the more exciting-sounding Samurai one, but when a dangerous Samurai sword is stolen from the exhibit, Ben must take on its thief - the new Big Bad in town, the Forever Knight.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a tour of the Japanese Robotics Museum, Ben finds hero-gone-wrong Tim Buktu 'trying to save' Tokyo from a Dragon, but has Tim finally turned over a new leaf, or is this just another one of his half-baked plans to play the part of hero?

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a family cookout at a forest campsite, Charmcaster users her magic to switch places with Gwen, but when Ben catches 'Charmcaster' sneaking about, he attacks- unaware it's actually his cursed cousin!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colorado, Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on a hike to find the Forgeti, but when they realize they've stumbled upon Billy Billions own 'Winter in July' ski resort, Ben must battle Billy-with an assist from the Forgeti itself.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben hops into the Rustbuggy for a driving lesson along the sand dunes of Cape Cod, but he takes a freaky switchback turn when the Rustbuggy is mutated into a motor-monster by Bootleg - another alien transformation of Kevin 11, with powers similar to Upgrade!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson travel to the Chrysalen Institute for some hot yoga and good vibes, only to find that the Bugg Brothers are on vacation, too- but are the sneaky insectoids really on holiday, or just cooking up yet another silly, yet high stakes scheme?

programme.title: Ben 10 S3

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will...

programme.title: Nations Championship
programme.desc: The inaugural Nations Championship kicks off with a blockbuster of a game as the three-time World Champions New Zealand entertain Six Nations winners France in Christchurch. The new tournament, which pits the best six teams in the Northern hemisphere against their Southern hemisphere counterparts, is designed to ensure every match in the summer and autumn counts - all leading to a finals weekend at the Allianz Stadium in November. Ugo Monye is joined by Maggie Alphonsi and former All Blacks skipper Sean Fitzpatrick, with commentary from Gareth Rhys Owen and Benjamin Kayser.

programme.title: James Martin's Spanish Adventure
programme.desc: Well-travelled and much-loved chef James Martin gets underneath the skin of Spain - a country he hardly knows but is excited to explore - as he discovers the history and culture of the country's diverse regions through food. It's a road trip like no other that stops at 20 destinations and travels anti-clockwise from San Sebastian to Girona through ever-changing landscapes to seek out key ingredients and sample the fine dining offerings, rustic eateries, and traditional recipes that make Spain one of the most exciting countries in the world for gastronomy. While on his journey, James will be setting up his mobile kitchen against backdrops of stunning scenery and also taking up residency in a gorgeous mountaintop villa as his Spanish 'home from home' kitchen to cook 80 mouth-watering recipes.
