programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James's journey takes him to Pegasus Bridge - famous for the D-Day landings - which he drives across in his beloved 2CV. Normandy is peppered with orchards and dairy farms, famed as cider and calvados country, and is also home to rich and world-famous butter - James sets up his mobile kitchen in one of the many apple orchards in the area, where he prepares a dish of artichokes with hollandaise. James also meets Laurent, who gave up working in a factory to make butter the way his mum taught him, and visits the Le Pave d'Auge restaurant in one of the most beautiful towns in France, where he meets a chef who likes to cook with as much butter as he does and is served a dish of sweetbreads and salsify. James then uses calvados in a pork dish with wet walnuts - All of this inspires two indulgent dishes back home, pain au chocolat using lots of that lovely butter, and black pudding with scallops.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: The fourth entry in the James Bond film series. Led by one-eyed evil mastermind Emilio Largo, the terrorist group SPECTRE hijacks two warheads from a NATO plane and threatens widespread nuclear destruction to extort 100 million pounds. James Bond is sent to recover the warheads from the heart of Largo's lair in the Bahamas - while facing underwater attacks from sharks and men alike, he must also convince the enchanting Domino, who serves as Largo's mistress, to become a key ally in his mission.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Alan is back and is joined on the farm this time by star of Gavin and Stacey Joanna Page, sports presenter and host of The High Performance Podcast Jake Humphrey dropping by, and India Hicks on the sofa to discuss the fascinating life of her mother Lady Pamela - there is also farmer Tom Davis, who brings along a pair of piglets to hog the limelight, and drinks expert Andy Clarke sharing his favourite tipples inspired by the movies in the Best of British feature to send off the show in style.

programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue has invited Ellie Simmonds back for a second visit to her kitchen after the two got on so well the first time - this occasion sees Paralympic gold medallist Ellie bake a coffee and walnut cake which the two enjoy with a cup of tea and a good catch-up. While Prue's food hero is a tea producer from the Vale of Glamorgan who makes loose leave tea and Kombucha tea, she has a versatile dish on the menu - a baked feta, roasted tomatoes and garlic dish which can be used as a starter with bread dipped into it. Prue then adds spinach and cooked pasta, gives it a good mix and serves it as a main course as John heads off to see Hamish Mackie, a local bronze sculptor and good friend who lets John have a go at creating an ornamental elephant. Prue is pleased with herself when a hack for picking up egg yolks goes very well - she's joined in the kitchen by John for chicken ramen and spicy edamame as the two take a trip down memory lane to a holiday in Japan when they tried many types of ramen.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, landscape artist David Domoney, and horticulturalists Katie Rushworth and Frances Tophill travel the country to come to the rescue of people who need their help in making the most of their outdoor spaces. Alan and the team transform barren plots and small neglected pieces of ground into stunning gardens and outdoor areas for relaxation while informing and inspiring viewers on how to recreate the looks themselves. Each episode sees Alan surprise garden owners who have an inspiring story to tell and whose outdoor space is in desperate need of a transformation - while the owner is whisked away out of sight, Alan designs the new-look garden by taking inspiration from the best gardens in the area and asking for help from local people and the owner's friends in completing the project.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: The first episode in the 14th series of the show follows a mother who was forced to give up her daughter as she searches for her only child and an adopted woman looks for the brother who was separated from her as a baby - in our first case, Ros Webb was 16 years old when she discovered that she was pregnant and her strict parents made her travel 100 miles to London to hide her pregnancy and then give up her child for adoption. Her daughter Christine was the only child Ros ever had and she is desperate to reunite with her after 59 years - Long Lost Family also search on behalf of Tegan Cornish who had a difficult adoption. Tegan began to look for her birth family as an adult - when she ordered up her birth records, she was shocked to discover that she had a younger brother and even more surprised to discover that her brother was originally meant to be adopted with her but for some reason was separated from her and sent back into care.

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. In a case that has drawn millions of views on TikTok, 17-year-old Charlie Cosser was fatally stabbed by 16-year-old Yura Varybrus at an end-of-term summer party for teenagers - Charlie didn't know Yura but had asked him to leave after a girl said that he had been bothering her. As Charlie lay dying, his dad Martin made him a promise that he would campaign for justice and raise awareness of knife crime - Martin's agonised, angry and tender videos tell the story of a family struggling to come to terms with an act of senseless violence that tore their lives apart.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: When Christopher's posh old schoolmates arrive for the National Debating Championships final, the Scouse lads fear losing him to his old world. Instead, the groups begin to bond until a drunken factory break-in, crashed forklift and night in the cells forces Christopher to confront where he belongs. In the debate final, Christopher delivers a personal argument about why people divide themselves and how belonging to two worlds can be a strength. Meanwhile, Anna's return fractures Aimee and Wayne's alliance when she offers a different version of the past, leaving Aimee torn between loyalty to her dad and the mum she never stopped missing. Lewis's redemption arc implodes when his public apology tour exposes more chaos than growth, forcing Kieron to stage an intervention.

Still struggling to knock the trainees into shape, Superintendents Bob Weekes and Julie Spry find themselves competing to accompany Chief Superintendent Cunningham to a conference in the Bahamas - elsewhere, Sergeant Daz Black is on a final warning about his violent conduct and must undergo anger management sessions as Julie assigns him to a course of therapy from the slightly under-qualified Melanie that makes him even angrier, and Student Officer Paul Huggins has been exposed as a mole (or 'prune in the nest') placed in the college by his criminal family and is now forced to work for the police as a 'double prune'.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy have to solve a double murder when a feisty former socialite and a Casanova are found bludgeoned to death. However, the motives for the murders seem disparate, and there are several people who are suspected of involvement.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Joyce Barnaby's new watercolour class takes her to the village green in Midsomer Florey, her project - to paint pictures for a charity auction - is led by the flamboyant Barrett Filby, whose enthusiasm for his pupils' work is infectious if a little misplaced. Other members of the painters' circle include Ann Carter, the no-nonsense houseproud wife of Tony, a menace who is having an affair, Tessa Hawksley, the wife of alcoholic and soon-to-be redundant bank manager Colin, and Ruth Fairfax, a dowdy sixty-something who takes her painting very seriously. Meanwhile, Barnaby and Troy are busy with Operation Pondlife, a scheme to combat street crime in Midsomer County, when Ruth Fairfax's body is found by Joyce and prompts Barnaby and Troy to begin investigating. After learning that Ruth was not who she claimed to be, the investigation is conspicuously taken out of Barnaby's control - due to his wife's involvement as a prime witness - and given to the National Intelligence Squad.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The death of a young film star at the opening of a Satanic experience at his family's ancestral pile brings Barnaby and Troy to the feuding villages of Upper and Lower Warden - the Smythe-Websters are certainly exploiting the work of celebrated House of Satan author Ellis Bell, but is there more to his legacy?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The beautiful, historic watermill in Lower Blissingham is home to award-winning artisan baker Tom Larkton and his pastry chef wife Chrissie. Having fully restored the two-century-old family site into a sustainable, state-of-the-art organic business, the charismatic power couple seem to have it all. Tom’s wildly popular online vlogs have even turned him into a minor celebrity. However, not everyone is raising a glass to their success. The destination's booming popularity has sparked fierce resentment among struggling local business owners, and rumours of an upcoming expansion push tensions to a boiling point. When the envy escalates into deadly sabotage, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter are called in to investigate. With livelihoods on the line, the duo must discover who is willing to kill to protect their turf before the bakery's empire completely crumbles.

programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When he becomes the sole witness to a dying man's enigmatic last words, bored Bobby Attfield teams up with beautiful socialite Frankie Derwent and family friend Miss Marple to solve the riddle that the words posed. Bobby's determination to find the truth is strengthened when someone tries to kill him, and the trio realise that a murderer is at large. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage and the group manage to charm an invitation to stay there. When they arrive, they soon uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery, and poisonous deceit. Miss Marple's search reaches into some dark corners as she observes the strange residents of the castle, including the other-worldly Sylvia Savage, her provocative daughter Dorothy, music teacher Roger Bassington, controlling psychiatrist Dr Nicholson, Nicholson's wife Moira and solemn butler Wilson. Marple tries to untangle the riddle and uncovers evidence which points to another murder - can she find the truth before even more people die?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Julian Shepherd is found drowned, it seems as though he died of suicide, because he couldn't access any of his money, which was all tied up in Midsomer Magna millionaire inventor Charles Edmonton's latest invention of a fuel-less transport system. But when another man dies after trying to steal peregrine eggs from the birds of Edmonton's wife, Mallory, at the Edmontons' mansion Casement Hall, Barnaby suspects foul play.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama about a detective whose patch is a seemingly idyllic rural district. programme.desc: Jasmine realises Shane is deeply involved in the MacFarlanes' affairs and searches his flat for incriminating evidence. Donna worries that Marlon will find out about her affair.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne leaves Liam Connor's funeral early to comfort Carla, while police break news to Kevin and Sally regarding Rosie Webster, and Tony desperately tries to comfort an inconsolable Carla.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony Gordon confesses to Carla Connor that he smashed the office window in a fit of rage, while Peter Barlow unexpectedly returns to Weatherfield alongside his young son Simon.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Frost, a policeman who believes in doing things his way, investigates the death of a local gigolo - although he is appalled by the indulgent activities of the ladies who availed themselves of the dead man's services, he can't help becoming interested in one of them in a more than professional manner.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. Maggie faces an agonising ordeal when she gets involved with a troubled family. Bernie reveals a mysterious hidden talent.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic 60s drama series set in a Yorkshire village. Mike feels responsible when a criminal's wife commits suicide. Blaketon has a narrow escape when he becomes embroiled in Greengrass's latest money-making scheme.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The funfair and daredevil riders of the wall of death make their annual visit to Midsomer village Whitcombe Mallet. When the owner of an equestrian centre is trampled by his horse, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to unravel a complex feud from the past where nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jasmine and Debbie are forced to act quickly when Ross arrives at Shane's flat. Paddy finds out about Donna's affair, while the Dingles put their plan to rescue Aaron into action.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Debbie persuades Eli to help dispose of the body and the conspirators get to work removing all evidence of the crime. Chas finds out more about Aaron's troubled past.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken and Deirdre realise Peter is not handling fatherhood well. DC Hooch arrives at Roy's Rolls and arrests Becky, while Tony feels angry as Carla leaves for Los Angeles.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rosie makes an ill-fated escape attempt, and Emily asks Norris if he is a transsexual, while Maria switches on Liam's mobile phone and finds all the calls he made to Carla.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 60s. Greengrass's foray into the fish and chip industry takes a dangerous turn when he becomes embroiled in a turf war. Ventress becomes obsessed with a widow whose home is targeted by yobs.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 60s. Mike and Jackie's relationship is threatened when her parents visit unexpectedly. Greengrass makes friends with a travelling musician who is not all he seems.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Murder mystery drama. Long-suppressed family secrets, stolen ancient artefacts, and a 30-year-old death at a Celtic burial site result in a series of murders.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a person is found dead in the cells, Sam becomes the main suspect and is subsequently suspended. Ronnie and Wes discover the true identity of the culprit but face a race against time for them to get their hands on him. Meanwhile, Jake and Kate argue over whether it was right to press charges against Tyler.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Sean Tully is found dead in a hotel room and the money that he was carrying has gone missing. Ronnie and Sam discover that Sean owed his ex-wife thousands of pounds in child support for their son, who has leukaemia. The boy's grandfather is the only suspect, and when he admits that he did shoot the deadbeat dad in self-defence, the case appears to be closed. However, Kate then discovers that an all too shocking truth is yet to be unearthed...

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part crime drama written by Lynda La Plante. A massive police search leads to the body of a missing five-year-old who has been the victim of sexual assault and strangulation - all the evidence points to a local drunkard being the guilty party, but it becomes clear that the outcome is by no means assured as the case goes to trial.

programme.title: Fewer

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK: Race For Glory
programme.desc: It's the second part of the semi-final, and with brand-new obstacles to face, the course is more extreme than ever as the best competitors from four heats return to fight it out for a place in the final. Could this be the time that someone finally conquers the course and gets the chance to climb to the top of Mount Midoriyama? Anyone who can achieve that will make history and be crowned as the first-ever Ninja Warrior UK.

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: A twelfth-century monk, who has settled down to a quiet religious life after a far-from-monastic youth, turns sleuth in another tale of medieval skulduggery. A great wedding is due to take place at the Abbey of Shrewsbury, for a beautiful young girl and a powerful Baron - but he's only interested in the contents of her dowry, not her heart. On the eve of the wedding he rides off into the night - and is never seen alive again.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Detective drama. Holmes is called in to investigate when the young heir of a reticent duke goes missing from his exclusive prep school.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Classic mystery drama with the world's most famous detective. Holmes is challenged to decipher the mystery of an obscure family document detailing an enigmatic ritual that may hold the key to a hidden treasure.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. With its last battle having been fought, the Peninsula War is finally over for Britain and her allies, but the action does not end here for Sharpe as he is framed by his long-time enemy Ducos and accused of stealing Napoleon's treasures. Sharpe also finds himself abandoned by his wife Jane, who returns to England and meets the handsome Lord Rossendale - now on the run from both the English and the French, Sharpe must find a way to prove his innocence.

As they attempt to reconcile the past and present, they realise that the real struggle is for the future...

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.title: Dragons

programme.title: Little Charmers

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2003. Frank gets a humiliating lesson from Ally, when he takes forbidden samples in the store.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2003. Ray's friend Andy gets a job at a radio station, and Ray is a guest on a show. When it turns out the host doesn't like Ray, Robert is overjoyed. Finally, there's someone who doesn't like Ray.

programme.title: The prisoners at the Fort
programme.desc: From 2023. The children's heroes from NRK Super, Margrethe Røed, Silje S. Winje and Matias Alegria meet the popular artists and TV faces Rein Alexander, Vidar Villa and Rikke Isaksen for an extreme duel at height.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. The gang in Radio Kvinesdal will have a live broadcast with a concert. Fred Åge and Sven Erik visit the city of Las Palmas, where both competitions and cake eating are on the agenda. The Gude family takes the trip to yoga.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2023. Marjorie's mess leads to dangerous conditions for her husband Irv, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease. With the help of experts, she cleans up the mess to avoid Irv having to move home.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2023. Marjorie's mess leads to dangerous conditions for her husband Irv, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease. With the help of experts, she cleans up the mess to avoid Irv having to move home.

programme.title: 13 soon 30
programme.desc: From 2004. The year is 1987, and Jenna is a 13-year-old girl who is about to knock on the door of adult life. The only problem is that it can't happen fast enough.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2024. Roger goes to the aquarium in Las Palmas to see sharks. Svein goes to a health resort to get rid of old bad habits. The ladies visit a softgun arena, while Inger is looking for a sun hat.

programme.title: Charter fever Denmark
programme.desc: From 2026. Nine Danish gangs arrive in Gran Canaria. Simone wants to go to the pool, but mum Bettina is stuck in the duty-free shop. The girls struggle with technology, and Kjeld puts his patience to the test when Susanne quits smoking.

programme.title: The bright side of life
programme.desc: From 1997. Melvin is the strangest man you can imagine. He works at home in his Manhattan apartment, where he tries to finish work on his latest bittersweet novel...

programme.title: Gulltransporten
programme.desc: From 2022. Fredrik is not the bravest of men, but now he is suddenly faced with a great responsibility and an enormous task - to get the entire Norwegian gold reserve away from the Nazis during the invasion of Norway.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: From 2013. Captain Richard Phillips tries to escape armed Somali pirates as the US Navy steps in to rescue him.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: From 2011. Some teachers simply give blank grades. For example Elizabeth. She drinks and gets high, and can't wait to marry a wealthy man and quit her miserable job.

programme.title: 24 timer med Gordon Ramsay
programme.desc: As of 2018. Ramsay and his team make an effort to help Bella Gianna's, a family-owned Italian restaurant in Congers, New York.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2003. Robert wants to propose to Amy, but must first convince her strict parents.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Per and Bahareh go on a camel safari and a small summit trip that ends with Per crawling to the cross. Bjørge and Tove go on a romantic trip to St.Lucia and we get to know our travel companions Lars and Monsen.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Aurora and Fleur go on a trip to one of Gran Canaria's mountains: Something that is not so easy for Aurora, who has a phobia of mountains. The Trønder boys go on a fishing trip, and we meet the happy pensioners in the Breakfast Club.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Mamma Aslaug and the rest of the family from Harstad go outside their comfort zone and try out crossfit for the first time. The influencers go on a horse ride, and the gang from Buskerud check out the carnival parade.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2024. A past trauma is the cause of a seemingly devoted midwife's hidden hoarding disorder.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2024. A past trauma is the cause of an apparently devoted midwife's hidden sexual dysfunction. Her availability around the clock makes it easier for her to hide her secret.

programme.title: Confessions of Octomom
programme.desc: From 2025. For years, speculation has swirled about who fathered Natalie Suleman's 14 children, and now she and her family are setting the record straight about her unconventional path to becoming a mom.

programme.title: The prisoners at the Fort
programme.desc: From 2023. Erlend Elias is pushed out of his comfort zone in every possible way in this intense duel against the gamer team led by Dennis Vareide. Fortnite world champion Emil "Nyrox" gets to experience the fear of heights he thought he didn't have.

programme.title: Kjartan cleans up - at home
programme.desc: From 2024. TIX is the king of frozen pizza, and believes that cooking steals time from music. But Kjartan suspects that it is actually the fear of failure that is stopping him. Can he show that cooking can be fun?

programme.title: Adventurous renovation
programme.desc: From 2022. The boys go to remote Ytre Fure in Stadlandet. Here they will transform an old Swiss villa into an idyllic and practical summer house. Halvor teaches Ole to lay wallpaper, and an exciting project also takes place under the old barn.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: As of 2016. US Army medic Desmond T. Doss, is a member of the Seventh-day Adventist Church, a Christian Protestant denomination, which for reasons of conscience refuses to bear arms.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: From 2021. At Kate's birthday party, relationships continue to unravel. Meanwhile, a sudden fire breaks out in the area. At the end of the evening, one of the women is found murdered.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: From 2021. Jenny defends Jake when suspicions are raised against him after the recent death. Finally, Kate demands that Sean reveal who he is having an affair with.

programme.title: Surviving a Serial Killer
programme.desc: From 2021. Rhonda Stapley was a student at the University of Utah when she was attacked by one of America's most notorious serial killers. Few women have survived the fatal encounter with Ted Bundy, Rhonda is one of them.

programme.title: Surviving a Serial Killer
programme.desc: From 2021. Art student Mo Lea moved from Liverpool to Leeds to begin an exciting new life at the university. But her dream turned into a nightmare when she was attacked by the infamous Yorkshire Ripper.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Dua sahabat, mantan biksu Shaolin, berpisah saat mereka berhadapan dengan pemberontakan yang sedang berlangsung melawan pemerintah. Yang satu ambisius dan bangkit menjadi komandan militer yang kuat, sementara temannya yang dikhianati mempelajari teknik Tai Chi yang tenang.

programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante's Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Dua sahabat, mantan biksu Shaolin, berpisah saat mereka berhadapan dengan pemberontakan yang sedang berlangsung melawan pemerintah. Yang satu ambisius dan bangkit menjadi komandan militer yang kuat, sementara temannya yang dikhianati mempelajari teknik Tai Chi yang tenang.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Sebuah kapal pengangkut jatuh dan meninggalkan awaknya terdampar di planet gurun yang dihuni oleh makhluk-makhluk haus darah yang muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Bencana di terowongan New York saat ledakan meruntuhkan kedua ujungnya. Seorang pahlawan mencoba membantu orang-orang di dalamnya menemukan jalan keluar.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire's annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Ketika mantan agen Pasukan Khusus Matt Collins memenangkan kompetisi bertahan hidup, ia menjadi "manusia terkuat di dunia" - sasaran empuk bagi jutawan bejat Danton Vachs, yang perburuan tahunannya menarik para pembunuh paling kejam di dunia.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle For The Universe
programme.desc: In 2210, a crew dispatched to rescue humans from a vampire attack discovers that the vampires are plotting a take-over…and getting help from a surprising source.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle For...
programme.desc: Pemburu vampir antar galaksi. "Buffy" bertemu "Star Trek" dalam dunia "Mad Max".

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: Phileas Fogg adalah seorang penemu yang yakin bahwa ia dapat berkeliling dunia dalam waktu 80 hari dengan didampingi oleh pelayannya yang setia, Passepartout, dan seorang pemandu jalan nan cantik bernama Monique.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Saudara kembar identik dipisahkan sejak lahir, yang satu menjadi mekanik jalanan, dan yang lainnya menjadi konduktor konser klasik yang ternama. Akhirnya bertemu di usia dewasa, mereka disangka satu sama lain dan terjerat dalam dunia masing-masing.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Ketika mantan agen Pasukan Khusus Matt Collins memenangkan kompetisi bertahan hidup, ia menjadi "manusia terkuat di dunia" - sasaran empuk bagi jutawan bejat Danton Vachs, yang perburuan tahunannya menarik para pembunuh paling kejam di dunia.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine faces the consequences of her actions. Mat faces the darkness in himself. Egwene faces the most powerful woman in the world.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things — Moiraine's true goal, Lan's past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: For twenty years, Moiraine has dreamed and worked towards this moment. But she can't stop the Dragon Reborn from seeing the appeal of the Dark.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Moiraine, Lan, Nynaeve, Egwene, Perrin, and Mat find themselves more alone than ever.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: The Two Rivers youths forge new relationships, while Lan tries to mend an old one.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Nynaeve faces her greatest fears. Rand seeks guidance on his powers from an unexpected source.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Moiraine searches for Rand while Nynaeve mourns her losses.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Moiraine and Rand flee for their lives. Egwene and Nynaeve encounter a new foe.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Rand makes a risky alliance and Egwene comes to terms with her new position.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: A familiar face foils Moiraine and Rand's plans.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Fate leads Rand and the others to an inevitable showdown with their most formidable enemies yet.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: A strange noblewoman arrives in a remote mountain village, claiming one of five youths is the reincarnation of an ancient power who once destroyed the world - and will do so again, if she's not able to discover which of them it is. But they all have less time than they think.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission - and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan find help in an unexpected - and unwanted - quarter, as the separated villagers try to find their way back to each other, or at least to refuge. But they all soon learn how far the Dark One's reach extends, and how few they can trust on the road.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine struggles with uncertainty while Lan struggles with their new companion. Rand wonders about Mat and Mat starts to wonder at himself. Egwene and Perrin take their first steps down a different path. An incredible new power is unleashed on the world.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time

programme.title: 8 Mile

programme.title: Croods, The
programme.desc: Ketika gua yang telah setia melindungi mereka hancur, keluarga Croods menjelajahi lanskap yang tidak dikenal saat mereka menemukan rumah baru. Dengan Nicolas Cage, Emma Stone, dan Ryan Reynolds.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: Seekor siput kebun secara ajaib mendapatkan kekuatan kecepatan super dan bermimpi untuk memenangkan balapan legendaris Indy 500.

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: Ben, seorang petugas keamanan sekolah, mencoba membuktikan dirinya layak menikahi saudara perempuan detektif James dalam sebuah patroli bersama di jalanan paling berbahaya di Atlanta.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: Saat hari pernikahannya semakin dekat, Ben menuju Miami bersama calon saudara iparnya, James, untuk menangkap seorang pengedar narkoba yang memasok barang kepada para pengedar di Atlanta.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Im Dong-hwan menemukan jasad ibunya yang hilang setelah empat puluh tahun. Bertekad untuk menemukan kebenaran di balik hilangnya ibunya, ia memulai perjalanan yang mengerikan untuk mengungkap rahasia kelam keluarganya.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Seorang penagih utang menderita kanker hati dan harus mendapatkan transplantasi hati dalam sepuluh hari. Seorang penipu bersedia mendonorkan hatinya jika ia bisa melacak pria yang memasukkannya ke dalam penjara.

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: Se-yeon, yang mengabdikan seluruh hidupnya untuk keluarganya, tiba-tiba menderita penyakit yang sangat parah. Kini, ia bertekad untuk menjalani hidup dengan baik dan mencari cinta pertamanya dengan bantuan suaminya.

programme.title: Honest Candidate 2

programme.title: Hitman 2
programme.desc: Setelah musim pertama yang sukses, Webtoon "Agent Jun" akan memulai musim keduanya.

programme.title: The Killer (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembunuh bayaran setuju untuk menjaga seorang gadis remaja, tetapi ketika gadis itu terlibat dengan orang-orang yang tidak baik, dia harus menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: The Night Owl
programme.desc: Seorang tunanetra yang merupakan ahli akupunktur secara ajaib mampu melihat secara normal di malam hari, dan ia tidak sengaja menyaksikan kematian putra mahkota.

programme.title: Usury Academy

programme.title: Secret: Untold Melody
programme.desc: Kisah seorang pianis yang kariernya terhenti karena cedera. Di sekolah musik di Korea, ia jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita misterius yang menginspirasinya untuk menekuni musik lagi, mengungkap rahasia yang dapat membelokkan waktu.

programme.title: The Killer

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Wilder Kaiser Classic vintage car rally. 122 classic vehicles set off from Ellmau in Tyrol on a two-day tour in which fantastic views, impressive mountain passes and special stages play the main role. In this episode, Martin also speaks with racing legend Hans-Joachim Stuck, who is connected to the event as an ambassador. And as always, these conversations are not only interesting, but often wonderfully humorous. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Eric van Lammeren tells the special story behind the recreation of the Bugatti Type 41 Royale prototype, which Ettore Bugatti used as a private vehicle for five years and which was considered lost for a long time after a crash. In the SML CarGroup showroom, Eric speaks to an audience with Thomas Hientz and presenter Martin Utberg about the background and fascination of this extraordinary project. Martin and Thomas are also traveling in a very special Mercedes-AMG PureSpeed. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: This time in Motorcycles: Motorcycling Made in England. Of course, THE British cult brand par excellence should not be missing, Triumph. We test the Tiger 800 and the Tiger 1050. With it, the English offer an absolute fun bike that is more competitive than ever with its typical triple and tight setup. And to get to the bottom of the British way of driving, Scotland is the destination of a motorcycle tour: to the Highlands with a BMW R 1200 RT. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Benjamin Ketterl is one of 58 emergency drivers in the Munich area. The Yellow Angel is mostly on the move in the city, but highway patrols are also part of the roster. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Men's dreams are born in Bottrop. If you are looking for exclusivity and find the performance of a Mercedes AMG to be too low, you have come to the right place: The Brabus company is one of the best-known tuners in the world. Motorvision shows what makes a Brabus so unique. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series or Audi A8, German sedans enjoy a worldwide reputation. They are famous for their perfection and prestige. Limousines Made in Germany are the epitome of status and they set the standards in terms of comfort, pioneering technology and safety systems. DreamCars presents the most famous, beautiful and luxurious German limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The creators of the Apollo 3500 GT wanted to camouflage and deceive. The appearance of the sleek two-seater, which was released in 1962, is pure Italy, from the chrome spoke wheels, the leather-lined interior to the Pininfarina-style body. The Apollo's creators and technology come from the USA. There's a V8 engine from Buick under the long hood for good reason. The cheap technology should make the GT 3500 affordable on the American market. Nevertheless, the project was not a great success. Only just under 100 pieces were made. Today the Apollo 3500 GT is rarer than many classic Ferraris. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: A M G: Always the epitome of top automotive performance, exclusivity and dynamic driving fun. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today from the Supercross Cup in Munich. With the best drivers from all over the world traveling to take home the crown - who will be King of Munich? We don't know it yet, but in a few minutes we'll be a little wiser - the highlight of the indoor motorsport scene this season. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: 40 years of Mercedes tuning: AMG CLK 63 Black Edition. Total Siberia: 7100 km, and 33 teams in the Transsyberia Rally. Audi RS 4 and Porsche 911 4S: upper class of corner robbers. The VW Tiguan in the off-road test. Hummer H3 vs Toyota FJ Cruiser: Two off-roaders in comparison. Subaru Impreza WRX and Mitsubishi Lancer EVO 9 in comparison (transmitter information).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In these episodes we look back at highlights from great events, Martin Utberg conducts interviews with guests and organizers via Skype. This time Classica Ice Marathon, Planai Classic and Black Forest Winter Challenge. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a racetrack icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: BMW S 1000 XR und Harley-Davidson LiveWire
programme.desc: The new BMW S 1000 XR is something like a BMW X6 on two wheels: the all-round qualities of an SUV, plus extreme sportiness with 160 hp. We test the new XR around Barcelona. In addition: For two weeks, around 150 drivers race along country roads and through towns at top speeds of over 300 km/h. We get to the bottom of the Tourist Trophy myth. And: An electric Harley is currently racing across roads all over the world as a prototype called LiveWire. Journalists, dealers and customers test the electric-powered Harley without a V2 engine and a roaring sound. The electricity bullet is scheduled to come onto the market before 2020. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Racing legend Hans Joachim Stuck, known as Strietzel, says goodbye to active racing at the 24-hour race. He won the first 24-hour race here at the age of just 19 and therefore chose the Nürburgring for his farewell performance. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Motorcycling – a hobby or sport with an adrenaline rush, but also with risk. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The automotive industry is currently changing completely: vehicles are developing into autonomous, fully networked digital devices. Road safety should improve significantly. But how do assistance systems actually work? And how safe are self-driving cars? MOTORVISION looks over the shoulders of Daimler engineers – shortly before the launch of the new S-Class in autumn 2017. (Station information).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the epitome of luxury, they are irresistible and breathtaking, they are the automotive upper class, the English limousines. Whether Bentley, Rolls Royce or Jaguar, built with the most expensive materials, English limousines combine timeless luxury, unique comfort and superior power. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and expensive English limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world's largest racing event for historic vehicles - the Goodwood Revival in England. Hosted by a count, the Earl of March. Over 150,000 fans flock to the country estate of the aristocratic racing fan. Visitors can expect many highlights, such as the race for the Shelby Cup, in which around 30 hot AC Cobras fight for fame and honor. Contemporary clothing is a must, racing legends do the honors, and you won't find more beautiful vintage cars from motorsport days gone by anywhere else. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: A world record of superlatives. The Porsche Taycan enters the Guinness Book of Records. Also: The hydrogen Hyundai Nexo, at the Hockenheimring with Walter Röhrl and the Skoda Trekka from the 1960s. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In part 2 of the 120 years of Mercedes Motorsport, Car History tells the story of Mercedes in motorsport with many original recordings and original interviews, from the comeback after the accident in Le Mans, the beginnings of rallying in the sixties, the legendary appearance with the red pig in Spa, the countless DTM successes, the return to Le Mans with the prototypes to the Formula 1 World Championships with Mika Häkkinen and the triumph with your own team in Formula 1. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Around the world in a sailing catamaran. Her name is Royal Clipper, the queen of the seas. She is a five-masted full-rigged ship and the largest true sailing ship in the world. Three days on board give you the opportunity to explore the ship from the bilge to the 55 meter high masthead and to show how a special kind of cruiser works. The captain and his hotel manager are happy to present the ship and chief engineer Aleksander also gives a tour of his kingdom. Chef Rudy from the Philippines prepares one of his delicious specialties. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The BMW 2002 Turbo was an absolute blast in its day. A real racer and Porsche killer. The Mercedes C111 was developed as a concept study. With a Wankel engine, sophisticated aerodynamics and a number of technical innovations. Michelle Mouton was certainly the fastest female rally driver in the history of rallying. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.sub-title: Visit to the trade fair with a celebrity bonus
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Fog, darkness, a rear-end collision with many cars. This happens again and again on German motorways. The “Stunt Heroes” recreate such a scene. It is the starting point for a stunt with people burning, a firefighter who arrives too late and a car that blows up. You can see how this works in this episode of the stunt report series. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg visits the Oldtimer Gallery Toffen in Switzerland, where he completes a course to become an auctioneer, drives two special classic cars and meets one of the few female mechanics in the classic car scene. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: The documentary series offers a unique insight into modern British policing. Camera teams follow police officers as they try to maintain order on England's streets. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.desc: Laura, a gallery assistant and wannabe fine art photographer, is finally promised a spot in a newcomer's showcase if she can get a reclusive artist, Shane, to premiere his newest photographs at the gallery.

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: Journalist Amy goes undercover at a happiness retreat run by the handsome Paul. Sparks fly between the two, but when Amy learns Paul is the secret son of a wealthy investor, she must choose between a career-making story and her growing feelings.

programme.title: Christmas Cupcakes
programme.desc: Two sisters enter a TV baking contest in a last-ditch effort to save the family bakery.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: Famed aesthetician Hope Goldman is about to take her career to the next level by launching her very own skin care line. However, she soon faces a new challenge when a rival opens a boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of who's trying to destroy her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Charlie Waldo is a former cop who left the force to live a life of simplicity and solitude in the woods. Alistair Pinch is an eccentric actor who spends his days drunk on the set of his TV show. When Pinch's wife is found dead, he becomes the prime suspect and convinces Waldo to come out of retirement to investigate what happened. The case finds Charlie contending with gangsters, Hollywood executives and pre-school teachers, all in pursuit of clearing Pinch's name -- or confirming his guilt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Both Sides of the Blade
programme.desc: A woman's life spirals out of control when she becomes involved in a passionate love triangle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: In the late 1960s and early 1970s, law enforcement discover a pattern of murdered hitchhikers and young men; their investigation lead them to an unassuming aerospace engineer, who lives a double life as a sadistic killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Patrick Kearney behind bars, police realize another predator is on the loose; an investigation leads to "The Freeway Killer" and his torture chamber on wheels; the murders suggest the work of more than one single killer.

programme.title: Butchers of L.A.
programme.desc: With Bonin behind bars, law enforcement hopes the nightmare is over, until another wave of freeway murders shatters their illusion; this third killer is the most methodical of them all and, if not for a random police check, might have evaded police.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E19 — The sporting legacy of Henry Ford Henry Ford would have been 150 years old in 2013. The show looks at three models that can be described as an important part of its sporting heritage: Ford Thunderbird (1955), Ford Mustang (1964) and Ford Capri (1968).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E5 — Episode 5With high-quality vehicles and a focus on hybrid and electric drives, Volvo offshoot Polestar is developing into a serious competitor to Tesla. Hyundai is also taking another, more sustainable path with the Nexo.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 E28 — Ford Motorsport - Racing ClassicsFor more than 100 years, Ford has been linked to motorsport and has always won many races. Ford has already celebrated victories with the GT40 at Le Mans, the Capri on the circuit and the Escort at the Monte-Carlo Rally and the Safari Rally.

The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here.

programme.desc: S1 E1 — Playing under pressureFive football talents under the age of 19 are fighting for their future at RB Leipzig. Before the first game, the pressure among them is already growing immensely as the coaches watch them closely and check who can make the jump.

programme.title: The Next Goal: Red Bull Bragantino
programme.desc: S1 E4 — New coach, new hopeWill a new coach be able to save the team from relegation.

programme.title: The Next Goal: Red Bull Bragantino
programme.desc: S1 E1 — New season aheadThe Brazilian team Red Bull Bragantino is looking forward to the start of the season. Coach Pedro Caixinha and his team have high hopes for this year. But a natural disaster poses a serious threat to the start of the season.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: London - LeipzigDjibril Cissé picks three players on the streets of London, England. But only one is allowed to train with RB Leipzig.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E5 — RB LeipzigDecisive days are now approaching for four talents: Niclas Stierlin, Kilian Ludewig, Naod Nani Mekonnen and Emre Diego Aslan are all fighting for their chances, new contracts and to find their own way in professional football.

programme.title: The Modus Mix
programme.desc: The Modus Mix - Evolution of Women's Surfing Follow established and aspiring female surfers who shaped the sport in the early 2000s.

programme.title: Poetic Silence
programme.desc: Poetic Silence - the waves of Indonesia Accompany the surfers on their boat trips to the perfect waves on the Mentawai Islands.

programme.title: MISSION 2TO4
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Test Rally TunisiaNew vehicle, new team, new game: Dakar champion Matthias Walkner swaps the bike for a buggy and starts the Dakar 2027 mission. This promises to be a comeback full of risks and new challenges.

programme.title: Reel Rock
programme.desc: S11 E3 — Climbing: Reel Rock - Trad ClimbingThe filmmakers traveled to the ends of the earth with cameras to record incredible stories. The series highlights the victories, failures and perseverance of mountaineers on their tours that lead into the unknown.

programme.title: Reel Rock
programme.desc: S11 E4 — Climbing: Reel Rock - Alpine Big Wall in PatagoniaThe filmmakers traveled to the ends of the earth with cameras to record incredible stories. The series highlights the victories, failures and perseverance of mountaineers on their tours that lead into the unknown.

programme.title: Shires
programme.desc: Shires is a cycling film shot over two years and narrated by Rob Warner.

programme.title: Peaches
programme.desc: Lisa Andersen, Rochelle Ballard, Layne Beachley, Serena Brooke and Megan Abubo continue to shape women's surfing after Blue Crush - and inspire a new generation worldwide.

programme.title: Now Days
programme.desc: Surfing is experiencing a historic turning point. When exceptional talents train together, the boundaries between friendship and competition become blurred. We dedicate ourselves to the challenges they encounter and that shape their team spirit.

programme.title: That’s Caroline
programme.desc: Caroline Marks is revolutionizing surfing! She started her career at 13 and is now chasing the biggest titles. Spectacular waves, impressive images – the American is the future of the sport.

programme.desc: South AmericaRyan Sheckler, Jamie Foy and the crew land on the most skate-crazy continent in the world - South America. The pros tour across Brazil, Argentina and Chile.

programme.title: Shaping Jordy
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, surfer Jordy Smith is spending the winter in his native South Africa. With the free surfing master Mikey February he goes in search of the best waves.

programme.title: Leticia Pushes Mzansi
programme.desc: Leticia Bufoni and Aldana Bertran explore South Africa's growing female skate scene - from Johannesburg to Cape Town. Also there: legend Mel Williams and a new generation of strong female rippers.

programme.title: Red Bull Drop In Tour

programme.title: For Reals

programme.title: For Reals
programme.desc: S1 E4 — Wingsuit action over a volcanoA plane races through a tunnel at 245 km/h and a wingsuit pilot glides over a volcano.

programme.title: Against Gravity
